original_snippet_context: The chronicler describes an encounter with an unusual gentleman who discusses social dynamics and how words lose their original meaning and value over time.
relevant_quote: Mas ás palavras acontece o que aconteceu ao café. O abuso e o excesso é que fazem a desvalorização.
justification: The mention of coffee valorization may suggest expansionist themes by relating the concept of value to market dynamics, however this is a social observation within the context of words losing their value, thus its ambiguous towards the Caixa de Conversão.
